msg.msg_body: Finished File checks and directory preparation: CPU user time: 6.8 seconds. CPU system time: 1.07 seconds. Elapsed time: 12.83 seconds; current allocated memory: 269.652 MB.

Since the only kind of statements allowed in a canonical dataflow region are variable declarations and function calls, the compiler may not be able to correctly handle the region (../task_detection_tpu/tpu_accel.cpp:395:9)

These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings. (../task_detection_tpu/tpu_accel.cpp:402:23)
